text:
limit (ICL) for the Part D 
benefit. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance percentage will not have a 
value in this field; reference instead the corresponding co-payment variable called 
(GAP_INNPP_COPAY_3M). 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The INNPP are currently 
referred to as standard retail pharmacies within split networks. There is no change in the meaning of 
the variable, and the data values are the same over time.
